texto: There we go, that word again: faith. Pajo fuckin loves it. I fuckin hate it. I hate it cos there's no way o trickin yerself into it, no amount o thinkin about it can get yeh there - yeh have it or yeh don't. And I don't.
explicacao: Citação de Trevor Byrne sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “There we go, that word again: faith. Pajo fuckin loves it. I fuckin hate it. I hate it cos there'…” articula reflexao, faith, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: I mean, wha comfort does pretendin to be a Buddhist or wharrever give him? What's wrong with pretendin to be a Catholic like the rest of us?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Trevor Byrne: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “I mean, wha comfort does pretendin to be a Buddhist or wharrever give him? What's wrong with pret…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, religious, pretendin pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e religious.
